Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Empire (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — The Empire is the governing body mentioned in the text.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Empire contains Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is an imperfect realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Empire is divided into regions under four Regents.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor has an influence on the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Empire is a political entity containing the town of Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Empire is described as weak and having collapsed in on itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Great Elders want to destroy the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Empire is weakening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Empire is an organization that the Consultants might join.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac holds the reins of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Shera has served the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Empire is a political entity described in the Introductory History of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan is willing to go to prison to serve the Empire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
